name: Chocolate Caramel Nut Cream Torte
recipeIngredient: 3 bars Snickers candy bars, chopped into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cookie crust by mixing 3/4 cup all-purpose flour, 1/3 cup softened butter or margarine, 3 tablespoons powdered sugar, and 1/8 teaspoon vanilla until a dough forms. Press the dough into an ungreased springform pan (8x3 inches or 8x1-1/2 inches) and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 to 13 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow to cool completely.
2. Beat the heavy whipping cream, powdered sugar, baking cocoa, and salt in a chilled medium mixing bowl with an electric mixer on high speed until stiff peaks form. Gently fold in the remaining chopped Snickers candy bars.
3. Spread the whipped cream mixture evenly over the cooled cookie crust, covering the chocolate pieces. Refrigerate for about 6 hours or until set.
4. If using a springform pan, loosen the sides of the torte with a metal spatula and carefully remove the pan. Store any remaining torte in the refrigerator.
